title: The Chutia Nagpur Encumbered Estates Act, 1876
full_text: The Chutia Nagpur Encumbered Estates Act, 1876 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 187606 Act Number: 06 Enactment Date: 1876-03-14 Act Year: 1876 Short Title: The Chutia Nagpur Encumbered Estates Act, 1876 Long Title: An Act to relieve certain Landholders in Chutia Nagpur. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Chutia Nagpur Encumbered Estates Act, 1876 I.--- PRELIMINARY. II.--- VESTING ORDER III.--- DUTIES OF MANAGER. IV.--- SETTLEMENT OF DEBTS. V.--- POWERS OF MANAGER. VI.--- MISCELLANEOUS. Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Power to vest management of property in an officer appointed by Commissioner. Section 3. Effect of order. Section 4. Manager to receive rents and profits, and pay therefrom. Section 5. Notice to claimants against holder of property. Section 6. Claim to contain full particulars. Section 7. Debt not duly notified to be barred. Section 8. Determination of debts. Section 9. Power to inquire into consideration for leases. Section 10. Appeal to Deputy Commissioner. Section 11. Scheme for settlement of debts. Section 12. Restoration of owner to his property. Section 13. Power to call for further particulars. Section 14. Power to summon witnesses and compel production of documents. Section 15. Investigation to be deemed a judicial proceeding. Section 16. Manager to have powers of holder of estate. Section 17. Power to lease. Section 18. Power to raise money by mortgage or sale. Section 19. Power to make rules. Section 20. Power to appoint new Managers. Section 21. Managers to be public servants. Section 22. Bar of suits. Section 23. Saving of jurisdiction of Courts in Chutia Nagpur in respect of certain suits. Section 24. Act not to affect powers conferred by Bengal Act II of 1869.
